title: Capture device-matrix evidence for a flow
description: Run a changed flow across a device/OS/state matrix and report screenshots, logs, and pass/fail per configuration.
body: Use when validating a mobile change beyond a single device. Actions: select a representative matrix (small/large phone, tablet; min and current OS; online/offline; permission granted/denied), run the flow on each, and report per-cell screenshots, relevant logs, and pass/fail with the failing step. Do not generalize from one emulator run. This skill exposes capability only and must not launch emulators/simulators without runtime permission. Validation signals include per-configuration screenshots and a coverage table. Risk boundary: if the matrix cannot be exercised, report uncovered configurations as unverified rather than assuming parity.
